    Index

    A

    addCard(Card) - Method in class Hand
    Adds a card to the hand.

    B

    Blackjackgame - Class in Unnamed Package
    The main class for the Blackjack game GUI and logic.
    Blackjackgame(User) - Constructor for class Blackjackgame
    Constructs the Blackjackgame window and initializes the game state for a user.
    boardHeight - Variable in class Blackjackgame
     
    boardWidth - Variable in class Blackjackgame
     
    build() - Method in class Deck
    Builds a standard 52-card deck.

    C

    canSplit() - Method in class Player
    Checks if the player can split their hand.
    Card - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a playing card with a suit and value for Blackjack.
    Card(String, String) - Constructor for class Card
    Constructs a Card with the given suit and value.
    cardHeight - Variable in class Blackjackgame
     
    cardsRemaining() - Method in class Deck
    Gets the number of cards remaining in the deck.
    cardWidth - Variable in class Blackjackgame
     
    clear() - Method in class Hand
    Clears all cards from the hand.
    clearHand() - Method in class Player
    Clears the player's hands and resets split state and bets.
    convertToGrayImage(Image) - Static method in class Blackjackgame
    Converts a colored image to grayscale for UI effects.
    CreateForm - Class in Unnamed Package
    Account creation form for the Blackjack application.
    CreateForm() - Constructor for class CreateForm
     
    createUser(String, String) - Method in class User
    Creates a new user in the database with the given name and password.

    D

    deal() - Method in class Deck
    Deals (removes and returns) the top card from the deck.
    dealIntialCardsforSplit() - Method in class Blackjackgame
    Deals initial cards for a forced split scenario.
    Deck - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a deck of playing cards for Blackjack.
    Deck() - Constructor for class Deck
    Constructs a new deck, builds and shuffles it.
    doubleDown(Card) - Method in class Player
    Doubles the player's current bet and adds a card to the hand.

    F

    forceSplit - Variable in class Blackjackgame
     

    G

    getActiveHand() - Method in class Player
    Gets the currently active hand (main or split).
    getActiveScore() - Method in class Player
    Gets the score of the currently active hand.
    getBalance() - Method in class Player
    Gets the player's current balance.
    getBalance() - Method in class User
    Gets the user's current balance.
    getBlackjackValue() - Method in class Card
    Gets the Blackjack value of the card.
    getCard(int) - Method in class Hand
    Gets the card at the specified index in the hand.
    getCards() - Method in class Hand
    Gets the list of cards in the hand.
    getCurrentBet() - Method in class Player
    Gets the player's current bet amount.
    getHand() - Method in class Player
    Gets the player's main hand.
    getImagePath() - Method in class Card
    Gets the image path for the card's GUI representation.
    getName() - Method in class Player
    Gets the player's name.
    getName() - Method in class User
    Gets the user's name.
    getScore() - Method in class Hand
    Calculates the total score of the hand, accounting for Aces as 1 or 11.
    getScore() - Method in class Player
    Gets the score of the player's main hand.
    getSplitBet() - Method in class Player
    Gets the player's split bet amount.
    getSplitHand() - Method in class Player
    Gets the player's split hand.
    getSuit() - Method in class Card
    Gets the suit of the card.
    getValue() - Method in class Card
    Gets the value of the card.

    H

    Hand - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a hand of cards in Blackjack.
    Hand() - Constructor for class Hand
    Constructs an empty hand.
    hasSplitHand() - Method in class Player
    Checks if the player currently has a split hand.

    I

    initialize() - Method in class CreateForm
    Initializes and displays the account creation form UI.
    initialize() - Method in class LoginForm
    Initializes and displays the login form UI.
    isActiveBust() - Method in class Player
    Checks if the currently active hand is bust.
    isBlackjack() - Method in class Hand
    Checks if the hand is a Blackjack (two cards totaling 21).
    isBlackjack() - Method in class Player
    Checks if the player's main hand is a Blackjack.
    isBust() - Method in class Hand
    Checks if the hand is bust (score > 21).
    isBust() - Method in class Player
    Checks if the player's main hand is bust.
    isEmpty() - Method in class Deck
    Checks if the deck is empty.
    isPlayingSplitHand() - Method in class Player
    Checks if the player is currently playing the split hand.

    L

    LoginForm - Class in Unnamed Package
    Login form for the Blackjack application.
    LoginForm() - Constructor for class LoginForm
     
    loseSplitBet() - Method in class Player
    Handles loss of the split bet (no action needed as bet is already deducted).

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class LoginForm
    Main entry point for the login form.
    mainHandGray - Variable in class Blackjackgame
     

    P

    placeBet(int) - Method in class Player
    Places a bet by deducting the amount from the player's balance.
    Player - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a player in the Blackjack game.
    Player(String) - Constructor for class Player
    Constructs a Player with a name and default balance.
    Player(String, int) - Constructor for class Player
    Constructs a Player with a name and starting balance.

    R

    receiveCard(Card) - Method in class Player
    Adds a card to the player's main hand.
    receiveCardToActive(Card) - Method in class Player
    Adds a card to the currently active hand.
    receiveCardToSplit(Card) - Method in class Player
    Adds a card to the player's split hand.

    S

    setBalance(int) - Method in class Player
    Sets the player's balance.
    setCurrentBet(int) - Method in class Player
    Sets the player's current bet amount.
    shuffle() - Method in class Deck
    Shuffles the deck randomly.
    size() - Method in class Hand
    Gets the number of cards in the hand.
    split(Card, Card) - Method in class Player
    Splits the player's hand into two and deals new cards to each.
    start() - Method in class Blackjackgame
    Starts a new round of Blackjack.
    switchToSplitHand() - Method in class Player
    Switches the active hand to the split hand.

    T

    tieBet() - Method in class Player
    Returns the main bet to the player's balance in case of a tie.
    tieSplitBet() - Method in class Player
    Returns the split bet to the player's balance in case of a tie.
    toStringGUI() - Method in class Card
    Returns a string representation for GUI display.

    U

    updateBalance(int) - Method in class User
    Updates the user's balance in the database.
    User - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a user of the Blackjack application.
    User() - Constructor for class User
     

    V

    validateUser(String, String) - Method in class User
    Validates the user's credentials against the database.

    W

    winBet() - Method in class Player
    Awards winnings for the main bet to the player's balance.
    winSplitBet() - Method in class Player
    Awards winnings for the split bet to the player's balance.
